hypothesis:
## Novel Hypothesis

Incorporating stereochemically-aware contrastive learning—where diastereomers and enantiomers of the same molecule are explicitly treated as distinct negative pairs during multimodal pretraining—will enable the model to learn chirality-sensitive molecular representations that maintain pose-invariance while distinguishing stereoisomers, thereby improving performance on stereoselective reaction prediction and drug-target binding affinity tasks where stereochemistry is functionally critical.
